name: outlook
description: Drive Microsoft Outlook desktop from Claude: read email, draft/send, manage calendar, apply categories. Uses local COM — no Azure/OAuth required.
long_description:
Connects Claude to your locally-installed Microsoft Outlook desktop client via COM automation.

**Capabilities**
- Email: list, read, search, move, delete, draft, reply, forward, send
- Calendar: list events, create, update, delete, respond to invites
- Categories: list master list, apply to emails or events

**Why no Azure AD?**
The extension talks directly to the Outlook client on your machine. If you can read the mailbox in Outlook, the extension can too — no OAuth app registration, no IT approval step.

**Windows only.** Requires Outlook desktop installed and [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) on PATH.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List Outlook accounts configured in the current profile

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List mail folders (optionally scoped to one account)

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a folder with filters

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Get full body, recipients, and attachment metadata for an email

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Substring search across subject/sender/body

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email to another folder

tools.name: delete_email
tools.description: Delete an email (soft delete to Deleted Items by default)

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email, optionally as a reply or forward

tools.name: update_draft
tools.description: Edit an existing draft

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a draft or compose-and-send in one call

tools.name: save_attachment
tools.description: Save an email attachment to a local file path

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the workspace master category list

tools.name: set_email_categories
tools.description: Apply/add/remove categories on an email

tools.name: set_event_categories
tools.description: Apply/add/remove categories on a calendar event

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List calendar events in a time range

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event or meeting invite

tools.name: update_calendar_event
tools.description: Update a calendar event, optionally notify attendees

tools.name: delete_calendar_event
tools.description: Delete a calendar event

tools.name: respond_to_invite
tools.description: Accept, tentatively accept, or decline a meeting invite

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts, optionally filtered by name/email/company

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get full details for a contact

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing contact

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Delete a contact (soft delete by default)

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks with optional completion and date filters

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get full details for a task

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as complete

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a task (soft delete by default)
